#+TITLE: [Project Name] - File Organization

* Project Structure

** Top-level Directory
Folders:
- .git/
- docs/
- src/
- [additional build/config folders as needed]

Files:
- AGENTS.org
- package.json
- tsconfig.json
- [additional config files as needed]

** Docs Folder Structure
Documentation organization:
- /docs
  - /coding-guides - coding standards and patterns
  - /project - project-specific documentation
  - /obsolete - outdated documentation

** Frontend Folder Structure
Feature-based organization:
- /src
  - app.tsx - main application component
  - index.tsx - application entry point
  - /components - shared UI components
    - /ui - primitive UI components
  - /features - feature-specific code
    - feature-name/ - individual feature directories
      - /components - feature-specific components
        - component-name.tsx - component implementation
        - component-name.module.css - CSS module styles
      - /stores - feature-specific state management
      - /types - TypeScript types for this feature
      - /utils - utility functions for this feature
      - feature-name.tsx - main feature component
      - feature-name.module.css - CSS module styles
  - /layout - layout components
    - layout.tsx - main layout component
    - layout.module.css - CSS module styles
    - /components - layout sub-components
      - /header - header component
        - header.tsx
        - header.module.css
      - additional layout components as needed
  - /services - frontend service implementations
    - service-name.ts - service implementation files
  - /stores - global state management
  - /styles - global styles and design tokens
    - color-tokens.css - raw color primitives
    - style-tokens.css - typography, spacing, layout tokens
    - semantic-tokens.css - semantic color mappings
    - global-reset.css - CSS reset and base styles
    - index.css - entry point that imports all tokens

** Backend Folder Structure
[Backend organization - adjust based on backend type]

Example for Tauri (Rust):
- /src-tauri
  - Cargo.toml - Rust dependencies
  - tauri.conf.json - Tauri configuration
  - /src
    - main.rs - application entry point
    - [additional .rs files as needed]

Example for Node.js:
- /server
  - package.json
  - /src
    - index.ts - server entry point
    - /routes - API route handlers
    - /services - business logic
    - /models - data models
